title: STANLEY 9mm Snap Off Blade Knives (Pack of 3) 2-10-150
features: A lightweight retractable knife with Quick Point snap off blades
Fresh sharp cutting points provided by every snap off section
Removable blade snapper included in cap of knife
description: From the manufacturer About Stanley STANLEY is one of the leading global manufacturer of hand tools, power tools and related accessories. Ever since its foundation in 1843, STANLEY has been committed to providing professionals across the globe with products which are smart, tough, pioneering and up to the task. For over 170 years, Stanley has been responsible for unlocking new levels of user performance through creating some of the most useful tools ever made inlcuding the Bailey Plane, the Surform shaper, the PowerLock tape rule, and most recently, the FatMax line of products. STANLEY SM Snap Off Blade Knives Features & Benefits Blade included in the body of the cutter for more safety Blade snapper included in handle for safety Multi-position push button for quick, easy use Two part moulded body that allows rapid blade changing SM Snap Off Blade Knives
